categories.title: ACADEMY AWARD WINNERS
categories.theme: Each clue describes an actor or actress who won an Academy Award for a specific role; the answer is the winner's name

clues.clue: This actor took home the 1994 Best Leading Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a slow-witted but kind-hearted Southerner who runs, plays ping-pong, and loves Jenny.
clues.fit_justification: Source question states 'Who won the 1994 Academy Award for Best Leading Actor for playing the role of Forrest Gump in Forrest Gump?' and source answer is 'Tom Hanks'.

clues.clue: She won the 2000 Best Leading Actress Oscar for portraying a real-life legal activist who took on a major utility company in California.
clues.fit_justification: Source question states 'Who won the 2000 Academy Award for Best Leading Actress for playing the role of Erin Brockovich in Erin Brockovich?' and source answer is 'Julia Roberts'.

clues.clue: This supporting actor won the 2004 Oscar for his role as trainer Eddie Scrap-Iron Dupris in a Clint Eastwood boxing drama.
clues.fit_justification: Source question states 'Who won the 2004 Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for playing the role of Eddie Scrap-Iron Dupris in Million Dollar Baby?' and source answer is 'Morgan Freeman'.

clues.clue: He claimed the 2019 Best Supporting Actor Oscar for playing stuntman Cliff Booth alongside Leonardo DiCaprio in a Tarantino film set in 1969 Hollywood.
clues.fit_justification: Source question states 'Who won the 2019 Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for playing the role of Cliff Booth in Once upon a Time...in Hollywood?' and source answer is 'Brad Pitt'.

clues.clue: This actor won the 2018 Best Leading Actor Oscar for his portrayal of legendary Queen frontman Freddie Mercury in a biographical film.
clues.fit_justification: Source question states 'Who won the 2018 Academy Award for Best Leading Actor for playing the role of Freddie Mercury in Bohemian Rhapsody?' and source answer is 'Rami Malek'.

categories.title: WHICH FILM CONTAINS THIS CHARACTER?
categories.theme: Each clue names a fictional film character; the answer is the film they appear in

clues.clue: The menacing shark hunter 'Captain Quint' sails these waters in this 1975 thriller.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally asks 'Which film contains the character Captain Quint?' and source answer is 'Jaws'.

clues.clue: The tormented cabbie 'Travis Bickle' prowls New York City's mean streets in this 1976 Martin Scorsese film.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally asks 'Which film contains the character Travis Bickle?' and source answer is 'Taxi Driver'.

clues.clue: The gold-obsessed prospector 'Fred C. Dobbs' descends into greed and paranoia in this 1948 classic.
clues.answer: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally asks 'Which film contains the character Fred C. Dobbs?' and source answer is 'The Treasure of the Sierra Madre'.

clues.clue: The scheming actress 'Eve Harrington' worms her way into a Broadway star's life in this 1950 drama.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks to name the movie matching the plot of 'A secretly ruthless woman insinuates herself into the lives of an aging actor and her circle of theater friends'; source answer is 'All About Eve', and the character Eve is central to the film's identity.

clues.clue: The flamboyant fading movie star 'Alan Swann' tries to recapture his glory on a live TV special in this 1982 comedy.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally asks 'Which film contains the character Alan Swann?' and source answer is 'My Favorite Year'.

finals.title: MOVIE QUOTES
finals.clue: The iconic line 'Say hello to my little friend!' is bellowed by Al Pacino's drug lord character in this 1983 Brian De Palma crime epic.
finals.fit_justification: Source question states 'Which movie contains the quote, "Say hello to my little friend!"?' and source answer is 'Scarface'; the question literally contains the quoted line and asks for the film title.
